a.label: Conjugate square-class module V = F_2^s tensor_F2 F_2[I]
a.standard_term: induced/permutation F_2[G]-module on formal radicand generators

b.label: Valuation functional lambda_v
b.standard_term: valuation-mod-2 homomorphism on a Kummer square-class group

evidence.label: Inertia interpretation of the valuation functional
evidence.summary:
Assume a discrete valuation `v` of `E` has residue characteristic different from two, and pass to the henselization at `v`. Under the Kummer pairing

```text
Gal(L/E) x W -> F_2,
```

the valuation functional `lambda_v`

evidence.label: Valuation functional lambda_v and parity matrix A
evidence.summary:
Every discrete valuation `v` of `E` defines an `F_2`-linear functional

```text
lambda_v: W -> F_2,
lambda_v([x]) = v(x) mod 2.                   (4.1)
```

This is well-defined because every square has even valuation.
